-5{margin-bottom:3rem!important}.mb-xxl-auto{margin-bottom:auto!important}.ms-xxl-0{margin-left:0!important}.ms-xxl-1{margin-left:.25rem!important}.ms-xxl-2{margin-left:.5rem!important}.ms-xxl-3{margin-left:1rem!important}.ms-xxl-4{margin-left:1.5rem!important}.ms-xxl-5{margin-left:3rem!important}.ms-xxl-auto{margin-left:auto!important}.p-xxl-0{padding:0!important}.p-xxl-1{padding:.25rem!important}.p-xxl-2{padding:.5rem!important}.p-xxl-3{padding:1rem!important}.p-xxl-4{padding:1.5rem!important}.p-xxl-5{padding:3rem!important}.px-xxl-0{padding-right:0!important;padding-left:0!important}.px-xxl-1{padding-right:.25rem!important;padding-left:.25rem!important}.px-xxl-2{padding-right:.5rem!important;padding-left:.5rem!important}.px-xxl-3{padding-right:1rem!important;padding-left:1rem!important}.px-xxl-4{padding-right:1.5rem!important;padding-left:1.5rem!important}.px-xxl-5{padding-right:3rem!important;padding-left:3rem!important}.py-xxl-0{padding-top:0!important;padding-bottom:0!important}.py-xxl-1{padding-top:.25rem!important;padding-bottom:.25rem!important}.py-xxl-2{padding-top:.5rem!important;padding-bottom:.5rem!important}.py-xxl-3{padding-top:1rem!important;padding-bottom:1rem!important}.py-xxl-4{padding-top:1.5rem!important;padding-bottom:1.5rem!important}.py-xxl-5{padding-top:3rem!important;padding-bottom:3rem!important}.pt-xxl-0{padding-top:0!important}.pt-xxl-1{padding-top:.25rem!important}.pt-xxl-2{padding-top:.5rem!important}.pt-xxl-3{padding-top:1rem!important}.pt-xxl-4{padding-top:1.5rem!important}.pt-xxl-5{padding-top:3rem!important}.pe-xxl-0{padding-right:0!important}.pe-xxl-1{padding-right:.25rem!important}.pe-xxl-2{padding-right:.5rem!important}.pe-xxl-3{padding-right:1rem!important}.pe-xxl-4{padding-right:1.5rem!important}.pe-xxl-5{padding-right:3rem!important}.pb-xxl-0{padding-bottom:0!important}.pb-xxl-1{padding-bottom:.25rem!important}.pb-xxl-2{padding-bottom:.5rem!important}.pb-xxl-3{padding-bottom:1rem!important}.pb-xxl-4{padding-bottom:1.5rem!important}.pb-xxl-5{padding-bottom:3rem!important}.ps-xxl-0{padding-left:0!important}.ps-xxl-1{padding-left:.25rem!important}.ps-xxl-2{padding-left:.5rem!important}.ps-xxl-3{padding-left:1rem!important}.ps-xxl-4{padding-left:1.5rem!important}.ps-xxl-5{padding-left:3rem!important}.gap-xxl-0{gap:0!important}.gap-xxl-1{gap:.25rem!important}.gap-xxl-2{gap:.5rem!important}.gap-xxl-3{gap:1rem!important}.gap-xxl-4{gap:1.5rem!important}.gap-xxl-5{gap:3rem!important}.row-gap-xxl-0{row-gap:0!important}.row-gap-xxl-1{row-gap:.25rem!important}.row-gap-xxl-2{row-gap:.5rem!important}.row-gap-xxl-3{row-gap:1rem!important}.row-gap-xxl-4{row-gap:1.5rem!important}.row-gap-xxl-5{row-gap:3rem!important}.column-gap-xxl-0{-moz-column-gap:0!important;column-gap:0!important}.column-gap-xxl-1{-moz-column-gap:0.25rem!important;column-gap:.25rem!important}.column-gap-xxl-2{-moz-column-gap:0.5rem!important;column-gap:.5rem!important}.column-gap-xxl-3{-moz-column-gap:1rem!important;column-gap:1rem!important}.column-gap-xxl-4{-moz-column-gap:1.5rem!important;column-gap:1.5rem!important}.column-gap-xxl-5{-moz-column-gap:3rem!important;column-gap:3rem!important}.text-xxl-start{text-align:left!important}.text-xxl-end{text-align:right!important}.text-xxl-center{text-align:center!important}}@media 12: /*# sourceMappingURL=bootstrap.min.css.map */

## File: src/components/AIBattle.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div class="container mt-5">
  3:     <!-- ゲーム開始前の設定画面 -->
  4:     <div v-if="!gameStarted" class="row justify-content-center">
  5:       <div class="col-md-8">
  6:         <div class="card">
  7:           <div class="card-header bg-danger text-white text-center">
  8:             <h2>🤖 AI対戦モード</h2>
  9:           </div>
 10:           <div class="card-body">
 11:             <div class="mb-3">
 12:               <label class="h5">問題数を選択</label>
 13:               <div class="btn-group btn-group-lg d-flex" role="group">
 14:                 <button
 15:                   v-for="count in [10, 20, 30]"
 16:                   :key="count"
 17:                   type="button"
 18:                   class="btn"
 19:                   :class="
 20:                     selectedQuestionCount === count
 21:                       ? 'btn-primary'
 22:                       : 'btn-outline-primary'
 23:                   "
 24:                   @click="selectedQuestionCount = count"
 25:                 >
 26:                   {{ count }}問
 27:                 </button>
 28:               </div>
 29:             </div>
 30:             <div class="mb-3 mt-4">
 31:               <label class="h5">難易度を選択</label>
 32:               <div class="btn-group btn-group-lg d-flex" role="group">
 33:                 <button
 34:                   type="button"
 35:                   class="btn"
 36:                   :class="
 37:                     difficulty === 'easy'
 38:                       ? 'btn-success'
 39:                       : 'btn-outline-success'
 40:                   "
 41:                   @click="difficulty = 'easy'"
 42:                 >
 43:                   やさしい
 44:                 </button>
 45:                 <button
 46:                   type="button"
 47:                   class="btn"
 48:                   :class="
 49:                     difficulty === 'normal'
 50:                       ? 'btn-warning'
 51:                       : 'btn-outline-warning'
 52:                   "
 53:                   @click="difficulty = 'normal'"
 54:                 >
 55:                   ふつう
 56:                 </button>
 57:                 <button
 58:                   type="button"
 59:                   class="btn"
 60:                   :class="
 61:                     difficulty === 'hard' ? 'btn-danger' : 'btn-outline-danger'
 62:                   "
 63:                   @click="difficulty = 'hard'"
 64:                 >
 65:                   むずかしい
 66:                 </button>
 67:               </div>
 68:               <small class="form-text text-muted mt-2">
 69:                 やさしい: AIの正答率 約60% / ふつう: AIの正答率 約75% /
 70:                 むずかしい: AIの正答率 約90%
 71:               </small>
 72:             </div>
 73:             <div class="text-center mt-4">
 74:               <button
 75:                 @click="startGame"
 76:                 class="btn btn-lg btn-primary ps-5 pe-5"
 77:               >
 78:                 対戦開始！
 79:               </button>
 80:             </div>
 81:           </div>
 82:         </div>
 83:       </div>
 84:     </div>
 85:     <!-- ゲーム中の画面 -->
 86:     <div v-else-if="!gameFinished" class="row justify-content-center">
 87:       <div class="col-md-10">
 88:         <!-- 音声読み上げトグル -->
 89:         <div class="row mb-3">
 90:           <div class="col-12 text-end">
 91:             <button
 92:               @click="clickSpeakToggle"
 93:               class="btn btn-sm"
 94:               :class="enableSpeak ? 'btn-success' : 'btn-outline-secondary'"
 95:             >
 96:               <span v-if="enableSpeak">🔊 読み上げ ON</span>
 97:               <span v-else>🔇 読み上げ OFF</span>
 98:             </button>
 99:           </div>
100:         </div>
101:         <!-- スコア表示 -->
102:         <div class="row mb-3">
103:           <div class="col-6">
104:             <div class="card bg-primary text-white">
105:               <div class="card-body text-center">
106:                 <h5>👤 あなた</h5>
107:                 <h2>{{ playerScore }} / {{ currentQuestionIndex }}</h2>
108:               </div>
109:             </div>
110:           </div>
111:           <div class="col-6">
112:             <div class="card bg-danger text-white">
113:               <div class="card-body text-center">
114:                 <h5>🤖 AI</h5>
115:                 <h2>{{ aiScore }} / {{ currentQuestionIndex }}</h2>
116:                 <div v-if="aiWrong" class="mt-2 badge badge-warning text-dark">
117:                   お手つき！
118:                 </div>
119:               </div>
120:             </div>
121:           </div>
122:         </div>
123:         <!-- 問題表示 -->
124:         <div class="card">
125:           <div class="card-header text-center">
126:             <h4>
127:               問題 {{ currentQuestionIndex + 1 }} / {{ selectedQuestionCount }}
128:             </h4>
129:           </div>
130:           <div class="card-body">
131:             <!-- 上の句（カウントダウン終了後のみ表示） -->
132:             <div v-if="countdown <= 0" class="text-center mb-4">
133:               <h3 class="question-text">{{ currentQuestion.question }}</h3>
134:             </div>
135:             <!-- 回答中の状態 -->
136:             <div v-if="!roundFinished">
137:               <!-- カウントダウン表示（選択肢の上部） -->
138:               <div v-if="countdown > 0" class="text-center mb-4">
139:                 <h1 class="countdown-number text-primary">{{ countdown }}</h1>
140:                 <p class="text-muted">下の句を確認してください</p>
141:               </div>
142:               <!-- 選択肢（カウントダウン中も常に表示） -->
143:               <div class="row">
144:                 <div
145:                   v-for="(choice, index) in choices"
146:                   :key="index"
147:                   class="col-md-6 mb-3"
148:                 >
149:                   <button
150:                     @click="selectAnswer(index)"
151:                     class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg btn-block choice-btn"
152:                     :disabled="!canAnswer"
153:                   >
154:                     {{ choice }}
155:                   </button>
156:                 </div>
157:               </div>
158:             </div>
159:             <!-- 回答後の結果表示（早押し式：正解が出たら即座に次へ） -->
160:             <div v-else>
161:               <div class="row">
162:                 <div
163:                   v-for="(choice, index) in choices"
164:                   :key="index"
165:                   class="col-md-6 mb-3"
166:                 >
167:                   <button
168:                     class="btn btn-lg btn-block choice-btn"
169:                     :class="{
170:                       'btn-success': index === correctAnswerIndex,
171:                       'btn-outline-secondary': index !== correctAnswerIndex,
172:                     }"
173:                     disabled
174:                   >
175:                     {{ choice }}
176:                     <span v-if="index === winnerAnswerIndex"
177:                       >（{{ winner === 'player' ? 'あなた' : 'AI' }}）</span
178:                     >
179:                   </button>
180:                 </div>
181:               </div>
182:               <div class="text-center mt-4">
183:                 <div v-if="winner === 'player'" class="alert alert-success">
184:                   <strong>✅ あなたが先に正解！</strong>
185:                 </div>
186:                 <div v-else-if="winner === 'ai'" class="alert alert-warning">
187:                   <strong>🤖 AIが先に正解！</strong>
188:                 </div>
189:                 <div v-else class="alert alert-info">
190:                   <strong>😢 どちらも不正解...</strong>
191:                 </div>
192:                 <p class="text-muted mt-2">{{ transitionMessage }}</p>
193:               </div>
194:             </div>
195:           </div>
196:         </div>
197:       </div>
198:     </div>
199:   </div>
200: </template>
201: <script>
202: import _ from 'underscore'
203: import poems from '@/data/poems'
204: export default {
205:   data () {
206:     return {
207:       // ゲーム設定
208:       gameStarted: false,
209:       gameFinished: false,
210:       selectedQuestionCount: 10,
211:       difficulty: 'normal',
212:       // 問題データ
213:       questions: [],
214:       currentQuestionIndex: 0,
215:       currentQuestion: {},
216:       choices: [],
217:       correctAnswerIndex: -1,
218:       // プレイヤーの状態
219:       playerScore: 0,
220:       playerAnswerTime: null,
221:       // AIの状態
222:       aiScore: 0,
223:       aiAnswerTime: null,
224:       aiWrong: false,
225:       // ラウンド状態（早押し式）
226:       roundFinished: false,
227:       winner: null, // 'player', 'ai', null（どちらも不正解）
228:       winnerAnswerIndex: -1,
229:       transitionMessage: '',
230:       aiTimeout: null,
231:       currentRoundId: 0, // 各問題に一意のIDを割り当てて競合を防ぐ
232:       // 音声読み上げ
233:       speak: new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(),
234:       enableSpeak: true,
235:       // カウントダウン
236:       countdown: 0,
237:       countdownInterval: null,
238:       canAnswer: false, // プレイヤーが回答可能かどうか
239:     }
240:   },
241:   mounted () {
242:     this.speak.pitch = 1
243:     this.speak.lang = 'ja-JP'
244:   },
245:   computed: {
246:     aiAccuracy () {
247:       const accuracyMap = {
248:         easy: 0.5, // 50% - 弱い
249:         normal: 0.75, // 75% - 普通
250:         hard: 0.95, // 95% - 強い
251:       }
252:       return accuracyMap[this.difficulty] || 0.75
253:     },
254:     aiDelayRange () {
255:       const delayMap = {
256:         easy: { min: 4500, max: 7500 }, // 遅い（4.5〜7.5秒）
257:         normal: { min: 2250, max: 4500 }, // 普通（2.25〜4.5秒）
258:         hard: { min: 750, max: 2250 }, // 速い（0.75〜2.25秒）
259:       }
260:       return delayMap[this.difficulty] || { min: 2250, max: 4500 }
261:     },
262:   },
263:   methods: {
264:     startGame () {
265:       this.gameStarted = true
266:       this.loadQuestions()
267:       this.loadQuestion()
268:     },
269:     loadQuestions () {
270:       // 全100首からランダムに必要な問題数を選択
271:       this.questions = _.sample(poems, this.selectedQuestionCount)
272:     },
273:     loadQuestion () {
274:       if (this.currentQuestionIndex >= this.questions.length) {
275:         this.finishGame()
276:         return
277:       }
278:       this.currentQuestion = this.questions[this.currentQuestionIndex]
279:       // 選択肢を生成（正解 + ダミー3つ）
280:       const dummyAnswers = poems
281:         .filter((q) => q.answer !== this.currentQuestion.answer)
282:         .map((q) => q.answer)
283:       const selectedDummyAnswers = _.sample(dummyAnswers, 3)
284:       const allChoices = [this.currentQuestion.answer, ...selectedDummyAnswers]
285:       this.choices = _.shuffle(allChoices)
286:       // 正解のインデックスを保存
287:       this.correctAnswerIndex = this.choices.indexOf(
288:         this.currentQuestion.answer
289:       )
290:       // 早押し式：状態をリセット
291:       this.roundFinished = false
292:       this.winner = null
293:       this.winnerAnswerIndex = -1
294:       this.transitionMessage = ''
295:       this.playerAnswerTime = null
296:       this.aiAnswerTime = null
297:       this.aiWrong = false
298:       this.canAnswer = false // カウントダウン中は回答不可
299:       // 新しいラウンドIDを生成して、古いAIタイマーのコールバックを無効化
300:       this.currentRoundId++
301:       // AIのタイマーをクリア（前の問題のタイマーが残っている場合）
302:       if (this.aiTimeout) {
303:         clearTimeout(this.aiTimeout)
304:         this.aiTimeout = null
305:       }
306:       // カウントダウンタイマーをクリア（前の問題のタイマーが残っている場合）
307:       if (this.countdownInterval) {
308:         clearInterval(this.countdownInterval)
309:         this.countdownInterval = null
310:       }
311:       // 3秒カウントダウンを開始
312:       this.countdown = 3
313:       this.countdownInterval = setInterval(() => {
314:         this.countdown--
315:         if (this.countdown <= 0) {
316:           clearInterval(this.countdownInterval)
317:           this.countdownInterval = null
318:           // カウントダウン終了後の処理順序：
319:           // 1. 音声読み上げ
320:           // 2. AIタイマー開始（重要：プレイヤーの回答許可より先に開始）
321:           // 3. プレイヤーの回答許可
322:           this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
323:           // AIタイマーを開始（currentRoundIdをキャプチャ）
324:           this.simulateAIAnswer()
325:           // プレイヤーの回答を許可
326:           // AIタイマーが確実に設定された後に許可することで競合状態を回避
327:           this.$nextTick(() => {
328:             this.canAnswer = true
329:           })
330:         }
331:       }, 1000)
332:     },
333:     selectAnswer (index) {
334:       // 回答不可の場合（カウントダウン中など）は何もしない
335:       if (!this.canAnswer || this.roundFinished) {
336:         return
337:       }
338:       // プレイヤーの回答時刻を記録
339:       this.playerAnswerTime = Date.now()
340:       // 正解かどうか判定
341:       const isCorrect = index === this.correctAnswerIndex
342:       if (isCorrect) {
343:         // プレイヤーが正解 → 即座にラウンド終了
344:         this.roundFinished = true
345:         this.winner = 'player'
346:         this.winnerAnswerIndex = index
347:         this.playerScore++
348:         this.$store.dispatch(
349:           'collection/addCollectedPoem',
350:           this.currentQuestion.id
351:         )
352:         // 正解の下の句を読み上げ
353:         this.speakAnswer()
354:         // AIのタイマーをキャンセル
355:         if (this.aiTimeout) {
356:           clearTimeout(this.aiTimeout)
357:           this.aiTimeout = null
358:         }
359:         // 2秒後に次の問題へ自動遷移
360:         this.transitionMessage = '2秒後に次の問題へ進みます...'
361:         setTimeout(() => {
362:           this.nextQuestion()
363:         }, 2000)
364:       } else {
365:         // プレイヤーが不正解 → AIの結果を待つ
366:         // AIがまだ答えていない場合は何もせず、AIのタイマーが発火するのを待つ
367:         // AIが既に答えている場合は、AIが正解していれば勝ち、そうでなければ引き分け
368:         if (this.aiAnswerTime !== null) {
369:           this.checkResult()
370:         }
371:       }
372:     },
373:     simulateAIAnswer () {
374:       // AIの思考時間（ランダム遅延）
375:       const delay =
376:         this.getSecureRandom() *
377:           (this.aiDelayRange.max - this.aiDelayRange.min) +
378:         this.aiDelayRange.min
379:       // 【競合状態対策】現在のラウンドIDをキャプチャ
380:       // このパターンにより、古いタイマーのコールバックを安全に無効化できる
381:       // 理由: clearTimeoutだけでは既にスケジュールされたコールバックの実行を完全には防げないため
382:       const roundIdAtStart = this.currentRoundId
383:       this.aiTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
384:         // 【競合状態チェック1】ラウンドIDの検証
385:         // ラウンドIDが変わっている = 既に次の問題に移行している
386:         // → この古いタイマーのコールバックをスキップ
387:         if (this.currentRoundId !== roundIdAtStart) {
388:           return
389:         }
390:         // 【競合状態チェック2】ラウンド終了状態の検証
391:         // プレイヤーが先に正解してラウンドが終了している場合はスキップ
392:         if (this.roundFinished) {
393:           return
394:         }
395:         // AIの回答時刻を記録
396:         this.aiAnswerTime = Date.now()
397:         // AIが正解するかどうかを判定
398:         const willAnswerCorrectly = this.getSecureRandom() < this.aiAccuracy
399:         if (willAnswerCorrectly) {
400:           // AIが正解 → 即座にラウンド終了
401:           this.roundFinished = true
402:           this.winner = 'ai'
403:           this.winnerAnswerIndex = this.correctAnswerIndex
404:           this.aiScore++
405:           // 正解の下の句を読み上げ
406:           this.speakAnswer()
407:           // 2秒後に次の問題へ自動遷移
408:           this.transitionMessage = '2秒後に次の問題へ進みます...'
409:           setTimeout(() => {
410:             this.nextQuestion()
411:           }, 2000)
412:         } else {
413:           // AIが不正解 → プレイヤーの結果を確認
414:           // 「お手つき！」バッジを表示してユーザーに視覚的フィードバックを提供
415:           this.aiWrong = true
416:           this.checkResult()
417:         }
418:       }, delay)
419:     },
420:     checkResult () {
421:       // プレイヤーとAIの両方が回答済みで、どちらも正解していない場合は引き分け
422:       if (this.playerAnswerTime !== null && this.aiAnswerTime !== null) {
423:         this.roundFinished = true
424:         this.winner = null
425:         this.winnerAnswerIndex = -1
426:         // 2秒後に次の問題へ自動遷移
427:         this.transitionMessage = '2秒後に次の問題へ進みます...'
428:         setTimeout(() => {
429:           this.nextQuestion()
430:         }, 2000)
431:       }
432:     },
433:     nextQuestion () {
434:       this.currentQuestionIndex++
435:       this.loadQuestion()
436:     },
437:     speakQuestionIfEnabled () {
438:       if (this.enableSpeak) {
439:         speechSynthesis.cancel(this.speak)
440:         this.speak.text = this.currentQuestion.question
441:         speechSynthesis.speak(this.speak)
442:       }
443:     },
444:     speakAnswer () {
445:       if (this.enableSpeak) {
446:         speechSynthesis.cancel(this.speak)
447:         this.speak.text = this.currentQuestion.answer
448:         speechSynthesis.speak(this.speak)
449:       }
450:     },
451:     getSecureRandom () {
452:       const cryptoObj = window.crypto || window.msCrypto
453:       if (cryptoObj?.getRandomValues) {
454:         const array = new Uint32Array(1)
455:         cryptoObj.getRandomValues(array)
456:         return array[0] / (0xffffffff + 1)
457:       }
458:       // CSPRNG が利用できない環境向けのフォールバック (古いブラウザやテスト環境での実行時エラーを防ぐ)
459:       return Math.random()
460:     },
461:     clickSpeakToggle () {
462:       this.enableSpeak = !this.enableSpeak
463:       this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
464:     },
465:     finishGame () {
466:       this.gameFinished = true
467:       // 結果画面に遷移
468:       this.$router.push({
469:         path: `/ai-battle-result/${this.playerScore}/${this.aiScore}/${this.selectedQuestionCount}/${this.difficulty}`,
470:       })
471:     },
472:   },
473: }
474: </script>
475: <style scoped>
476: .question-text {
477:   font-size: 1.5rem;
478:   line-height: 1.8;
479:   color: #333;
480: }
481: .choice-btn {
482:   min-height: 80px;
483:   font-size: 1.1rem;
484:   white-space: normal;
485:   overflow-wrap: break-word;
486: }
487: .card-header h2,
488: .card-header h4 {
489:   margin: 0;
490: }
491: .countdown-number {
492:   font-size: 3rem;
493:   font-weight: bold;
494:   animation: pulse 1s infinite;
495:   margin: 0;
496: }
497: @keyframes pulse {
498:   0%,
499:   100% {
500:     transform: scale(1);
501:     opacity: 1;
502:   }
503:   50% {
504:     transform: scale(1.05);
505:     opacity: 0.9;
506:   }
507: }
508: </style>
````

## File: src/components/AIBattleResult.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div class="container mt-5">
  3:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
  4:       <div class="col-md-8">
  5:         <div class="card">
  6:           <div class="card-header text-white text-center" :class="resultHeaderClass">
  7:             <h2>{{ resultTitle }}</h2>
  8:           </div>
  9:           <div class="card-body text-center">
 10:             <!-- 勝敗表示 -->
 11:             <div class="mb-4">
 12:               <h1 class="display-1">{{ resultEmoji }}</h1>
 13:             </div>
 14:             <!-- スコア表示 -->
 15:             <div class="row mb-4">
 16:               <div class="col-md-6">
 17:                 <div class="card" :class="playerWon ? 'bg-primary text-white' : 'bg-light'">
 18:                   <div class="card-body">
 19:                     <h5>👤 あなた</h5>
 20:                     <h1>{{ playerScore }} / {{ totalQuestions }}</h1>
 21:                     <p class="mb-0">正答率: {{ playerAccuracy }}%</p>
 22:                   </div>
 23:                 </div>
 24:               </div>
 25:               <div class="col-md-6">
 26:                 <div class="card" :class="aiWon ? 'bg-danger text-white' : 'bg-light'">
 27:                   <div class="card-body">
 28:                     <h5>🤖 AI</h5>
 29:                     <h1>{{ aiScore }} / {{ totalQuestions }}</h1>
 30:                     <p class="mb-0">正答率: {{ aiAccuracy }}%</p>
 31:                   </div>
 32:                 </div>
 33:               </div>
 34:             </div>
 35:             <!-- ゲーム情報 -->
 36:             <div class="card bg-light mb-4">
 37:               <div class="card-body">
 38:                 <div class="row">
 39:                   <div class="col-md-6">
 40:                     <h6>問題数</h6>
 41:                     <p class="mb-0">{{ totalQuestions }}問</p>
 42:                   </div>
 43:                   <div class="col-md-6">
 44:                     <h6>難易度</h6>
 45:                     <p class="mb-0">{{ difficultyLabel }}</p>
 46:                   </div>
 47:                 </div>
 48:               </div>
 49:             </div>
 50:             <!-- 結果メッセージ -->
 51:             <div class="alert" :class="resultAlertClass">
 52:               {{ resultMessage }}
 53:             </div>
 54:             <!-- アクションボタン -->
 55:             <div class="mt-4">
 56:               <router-link to="/ai-battle" class="btn btn-danger btn-lg me-2">
 57:                 🤖 もう一度対戦
 58:               </router-link>
 59:               <router-link to="/time-attack" class="btn btn-success btn-lg me-2">
 60:                 ⏱️ タイムアタックに挑戦
 61:               </router-link>
 62:               <router-link to="/" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">
 63:                 ホームに戻る
 64:               </router-link>
 65:             </div>
 66:           </div>
 67:         </div>
 68:       </div>
 69:     </div>
 70:   </div>
 71: </template>
 72: <script>
 73: export default {
 74:   data () {
 75:     return {
 76:       playerScore: 0,
 77:       aiScore: 0,
 78:       totalQuestions: 0,
 79:       difficulty: 'normal'
 80:     }
 81:   },
 82:   computed: {
 83:     playerWon () {
 84:       return this.playerScore > this.aiScore
 85:     },
 86:     aiWon () {
 87:       return this.aiScore > this.playerScore
 88:     },
 89:     isDraw () {
 90:       return this.playerScore === this.aiScore
 91:     },
 92:     playerAccuracy () {
 93:       return ((this.playerScore / this.totalQuestions) * 100).toFixed(1)
 94:     },
 95:     aiAccuracy () {
 96:       return ((this.aiScore / this.totalQuestions) * 100).toFixed(1)
 97:     },
 98:     resultTitle () {
 99:       if (this.playerWon) {
100:         return 'あなたの勝ち！'
101:       } else if (this.aiWon) {
102:         return 'AIの勝ち...'
103:       } else {
104:         return '引き分け'
105:       }
106:     },
107:     resultEmoji () {
108:       if (this.playerWon) {
109:         return '🎉'
110:       } else if (this.aiWon) {
111:         return '😢'
112:       } else {
113:         return '🤝'
114:       }
115:     },
116:     resultHeaderClass () {
117:       if (this.playerWon) {
118:         return 'bg-success'
119:       } else if (this.aiWon) {
120:         return 'bg-danger'
121:       } else {
122:         return 'bg-warning'
123:       }
124:     },
125:     resultAlertClass () {
126:       if (this.playerWon) {
127:         return 'alert-success'
128:       } else if (this.aiWon) {
129:         return 'alert-danger'
130:       } else {
131:         return 'alert-warning'
132:       }
133:     },
134:     resultMessage () {
135:       const scoreDiff = Math.abs(this.playerScore - this.aiScore)
136:       if (this.playerWon) {
137:         if (scoreDiff >= 5) {
138:           return '完璧な勝利です！次は難易度を上げてみましょう！'
139:         } else if (scoreDiff >= 3) {
140:           return 'すばらしい！AIに勝ちました！'
141:         } else {
142:           return 'ぎりぎりの勝利！接戦でしたね！'
143:         }
144:       } else if (this.aiWon) {
145:         if (scoreDiff >= 5) {
146:           return 'もう一度挑戦してみましょう！練習あるのみです！'
147:         } else if (scoreDiff >= 3) {
148:           return '惜しい！もう少しでAIに勝てそうです！'
149:         } else {
150:           return 'あと一歩！次こそ勝ちましょう！'
151:         }
152:       } else {
153:         return '引き分けです！実力が拮抗していますね！'
154:       }
155:     },
156:     difficultyLabel () {
157:       const difficultyMap = {
158:         easy: 'やさしい',
159:         normal: 'ふつう',
160:         hard: 'むずかしい'
161:       }
162:       return difficultyMap[this.difficulty] || 'ふつう'
163:     }
164:   },
165:   mounted () {
166:     // ルートパラメータから値を取得
167:     this.playerScore = parseInt(this.$route.params.playerScore) || 0
168:     this.aiScore = parseInt(this.$route.params.aiScore) || 0
169:     this.totalQuestions = parseInt(this.$route.params.totalQuestions) || 10
170:     this.difficulty = this.$route.params.difficulty || 'normal'
171:   }
172: }
173: </script>
174: <style scoped>
175: .display-1 {
176:   font-size: 6rem;
177: }
178: .card-header h2 {
179:   margin: 0;
180: }
181: .card-body h1 {
182:   font-size: 3rem;
183:   font-weight: bold;
184: }
185: </style>
````

## File: src/components/Badges.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div class="badges-container">
  3:     <div class="row">
  4:       <div class="col-12">
  5:         <h2 class="text-center mb-4">🎖️ バッジコレクション</h2>
  6:       </div>
  7:     </div>
  8:     <!-- 獲得状況サマリー -->
  9:     <div class="row justify-content-center mb-4">
 10:       <div class="col-md-6">
 11:         <div class="card bg-gradient-primary text-white">
 12:           <div class="card-body text-center">
 13:             <h3 class="display-4 mb-2">{{ unlockedCount }} / {{ totalBadges }}</h3>
 14:             <p class="mb-2">バッジを獲得しました</p>
 15:             <b-progress :value="badgeRate" :max="100" height="2rem" variant="warning">
 16:               <b-progress-bar :value="badgeRate">
 17:                 <strong>{{ badgeRate }}%</strong>
 18:               </b-progress-bar>
 19:             </b-progress>
 20:           </div>
 21:         </div>
 22:       </div>
 23:     </div>
 24:     <!-- レアリティフィルター -->
 25:     <div class="row justify-content-center mb-3">
 26:       <div class="col-auto">
 27:         <b-button-group>
 28:           <b-button
 29:             :variant="rarityFilter === 'all' ? 'primary' : 'outline-primary'"
 30:             @click="rarityFilter = 'all'"
 31:           >
 32:             すべて
 33:           </b-button>
 34:           <b-button
 35:             :variant="rarityFilter === 'common' ? 'secondary' : 'outline-secondary'"
 36:             @click="rarityFilter = 'common'"
 37:           >
 38:             コモン
 39:           </b-button>
 40:           <b-button
 41:             :variant="rarityFilter === 'uncommon' ? 'success' : 'outline-success'"
 42:             @click="rarityFilter = 'uncommon'"
 43:           >
 44:             アンコモン
 45:           </b-button>
 46:           <b-button
 47:             :variant="rarityFilter === 'rare' ? 'info' : 'outline-info'"
 48:             @click="rarityFilter = 'rare'"
 49:           >
 50:             レア
 51:           </b-button>
 52:           <b-button
 53:             :variant="rarityFilter === 'legendary' ? 'warning' : 'outline-warning'"
 54:             @click="rarityFilter = 'legendary'"
 55:           >
 56:             レジェンダリー
 57:           </b-button>
 58:         </b-button-group>
 59:       </div>
 60:     </div>
 61:     <!-- バッジグリッド -->
 62:     <div class="row">
 63:       <div
 64:         v-for="badge in filteredBadges"
 65:         :key="badge.id"
 66:         class="col-6 col-md-4 col-lg-3 mb-4"
 67:       >
 68:         <div
 69:           class="badge-card card h-100"
 70:           :class="{
 71:             'unlocked': isUnlocked(badge.id),
 72:             'locked': !isUnlocked(badge.id)
 73:           }"
 74:           @click="showBadgeDetail(badge)"
 75:         >
 76:           <div class="card-body text-center">
 77:             <div
 78:               class="badge-icon mb-2"
 79:               :class="{ 'grayscale': !isUnlocked(badge.id) }"
 80:             >
 81:               {{ badge.icon }}
 82:             </div>
 83:             <div
 84:               class="badge-rarity mb-2"
 85:               :style="{ color: rarityColors[badge.rarity] }"
 86:             >
 87:               {{ rarityLabels[badge.rarity] }}
 88:             </div>
 89:             <h5 class="badge-name">{{ badge.name }}</h5>
 90:             <p
 91:               class="badge-description text-muted small"
 92:               :class="{ 'blurred': !isUnlocked(badge.id) }"
 93:             >
 94:               {{ badge.description }}
 95:             </p>
 96:             <div v-if="!isUnlocked(badge.id)" class="badge-lock">
 97:               🔒
 98:             </div>
 99:           </div>
100:         </div>
101:       </div>
102:     </div>
103:     <!-- バッジ詳細モーダル -->
104:     <b-modal
105:       v-model="showModal"
106:       :title="selectedBadge ? selectedBadge.name : ''"
107:       hide-footer
108:       centered
109:     >
110:       <div v-if="selectedBadge" class="text-center">
111:         <div class="modal-badge-icon mb-3">
112:           {{ selectedBadge.icon }}
113:         </div>
114:         <div
115:           class="modal-badge-rarity mb-3"
116:           :style="{ color: rarityColors[selectedBadge.rarity] }"
117:         >
118:           {{ rarityLabels[selectedBadge.rarity] }}
119:         </div>
120:         <p class="modal-badge-description">
121:           {{ selectedBadge.description }}
122:         </p>
123:         <div v-if="isUnlocked(selectedBadge.id)" class="alert alert-success">
124:           ✅ 獲得済み
125:         </div>
126:         <div v-else class="alert alert-secondary">
127:           🔒 未獲得
128:         </div>
129:       </div>
130:     </b-modal>
131:   </div>
132: </template>
133: <script>
134: import { badges, rarityColors, rarityLabels } from '@/data/badges'
135: export default {
136:   name: 'Badges',
137:   data () {
138:     return {
139:       badges,
140:       rarityColors,
141:       rarityLabels,
142:       unlockedBadgeIds: [],
143:       rarityFilter: 'all',
144:       showModal: false,
145:       selectedBadge: null
146:     }
147:   },
148:   computed: {
149:     totalBadges () {
150:       return this.badges.length
151:     },
152:     unlockedCount () {
153:       return this.unlockedBadgeIds.length
154:     },
155:     badgeRate () {
156:       if (this.totalBadges === 0) return 0
157:       return Math.round((this.unlockedCount / this.totalBadges) * 100)
158:     },
159:     filteredBadges () {
160:       if (this.rarityFilter === 'all') {
161:         return this.badges
162:       }
163:       return this.badges.filter(b => b.rarity === this.rarityFilter)
164:     }
165:   },
166:   methods: {
167:     isUnlocked (badgeId) {
168:       return this.unlockedBadgeIds.includes(badgeId)
169:     },
170:     showBadgeDetail (badge) {
171:       this.selectedBadge = badge
172:       this.showModal = true
173:     },
174:     loadUnlockedBadges () {
175:       const saved = localStorage.getItem('unlockedBadgeIds')
176:       if (saved) {
177:         try {
178:           this.unlockedBadgeIds = JSON.parse(saved)
179:         } catch (e) {
180:           console.error('Failed to parse unlockedBadgeIds from localStorage:', e)
181:           // エラー発生時はデータをクリアして初期化
182:           this.unlockedBadgeIds = []
183:           localStorage.removeItem('unlockedBadgeIds')
184:         }
185:       }
186:     },
187:     // コレクション系バッジのみをチェック・解除するメソッド
188:     // NOTE: time_attack, ai_battle_win などの他のバッジタイプは未実装です
189:     // 今後、各ゲームモードの終了時に適切なバッジチェックを実装する予定です
190:     checkAndUnlockCollectionBadges () {
191:       // コレクション数は collection ストアから取得（localStorage 直参照は廃止）
192:       const collectionCount = this.$store.getters['collection/collectedCount']
193:       // コレクション系バッジのみをチェック
194:       this.badges.forEach(badge => {
195:         if (badge.condition.type === 'collection') {
196:           if (collectionCount >= badge.condition.count) {
197:             if (!this.isUnlocked(badge.id)) {
198:               this.unlockBadge(badge.id)
199:             }
200:           }
201:         }
202:       })
203:     },
204:     unlockBadge (badgeId) {
205:       if (!this.unlockedBadgeIds.includes(badgeId)) {
206:         this.unlockedBadgeIds.push(badgeId)
207:         localStorage.setItem('unlockedBadgeIds', JSON.stringify(this.unlockedBadgeIds))
208:       }
209:     }
210:   },
211:   mounted () {
212:     this.loadUnlockedBadges()
213:     this.checkAndUnlockCollectionBadges()
214:   }
215: }
216: </script>
217: <style scoped>
218: .badges-container {
219:   padding: 20px;
220: }
221: .badge-card {
222:   cursor: pointer;
223:   transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
224:   border: 2px solid transparent;
225: }
226: .badge-card:hover {
227:   transform: translateY(-5px);
228:   box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgb(0 0 0 / 20%);
229: }
230: .badge-card.unlocked {
231:   border-color: #28a745;
232:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 0%, #e8f5e9 100%);
233: }
234: .badge-card.locked {
235:   border-color: #dee2e6;
236:   background: #f8f9fa;
237:   opacity: 0.7;
238: }
239: .badge-icon {
240:   font-size: 4rem;
241:   transition: filter 0.3s;
242: }
243: .badge-icon.grayscale {
244:   filter: grayscale(100%);
245: }
246: .badge-rarity {
247:   font-weight: bold;
248:   font-size: 0.8rem;
249:   text-transform: uppercase;
250: }
251: .badge-name {
252:   font-size: 1rem;
253:   margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
254: }
255: .badge-description {
256:   font-size: 0.85rem;
257:   min-height: 2.5rem;
258: }
259: .badge-description.blurred {
260:   filter: blur(4px);
261:   user-select: none;
262: }
263: .badge-lock {
264:   position: absolute;
265:   top: 10px;
266:   right: 10px;
267:   font-size: 1.5rem;
268: }
269: .modal-badge-icon {
270:   font-size: 6rem;
271: }
272: .modal-badge-rarity {
273:   font-weight: bold;
274:   font-size: 1.2rem;
275:   text-transform: uppercase;
276: }
277: .modal-badge-description {
278:   font-size: 1.1rem;
279:   margin-bottom: 1rem;
280: }
281: .bg-gradient-primary {
282:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
283: }
284: </style>
````

## File: src/components/Collection.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div class="collection-container">
  3:     <div class="row mb-3">
  4:       <div class="col">
  5:         <h2>📚 百人一首コレクション図鑑</h2>
  6:         <p class="text-muted">おぼえた歌を集めよう！</p>
  7:       </div>
  8:     </div>
  9:     <!-- 進捗表示 -->
 10:     <div class="row mb-4">
 11:       <div class="col-md-6">
 12:         <div class="card bg-success text-white">
 13:           <div class="card-body">
 14:             <h5 class="card-title">コレクション達成度</h5>
 15:             <h2 class="display-4">{{ collectedCount }} / {{ totalCount }}</h2>
 16:             <b-progress
 17:               :value="collectionRate"
 18:               :max="100"
 19:               class="mt-2"
 20:               height="2rem"
 21:             >
 22:               <b-progress-bar :value="collectionRate">
 23:                 <strong>{{ collectionRate }}%</strong>
 24:               </b-progress-bar>
 25:             </b-progress>
 26:           </div>
 27:         </div>
 28:       </div>
 29:     </div>
 30:     <!-- フィルター -->
 31:     <div class="row mb-3">
 32:       <div class="col">
 33:         <b-button-group>
 34:           <b-button
 35:             :variant="filter === 'all' ? 'primary' : 'outline-primary'"
 36:             @click="filter = 'all'"
 37:           >
 38:             すべて
 39:           </b-button>
 40:           <b-button
 41:             :variant="filter === 'collected' ? 'success' : 'outline-success'"
 42:             @click="filter = 'collected'"
 43:           >
 44:             おぼえた歌
 45:           </b-button>
 46:           <b-button
 47:             :variant="
 48:               filter === 'uncollected' ? 'secondary' : 'outline-secondary'
 49:             "
 50:             @click="filter = 'uncollected'"
 51:           >
 52:             まだおぼえていない歌
 53:           </b-button>
 54:         </b-button-group>
 55:       </div>
 56:     </div>
 57:     <!-- 歌のグリッド表示 -->
 58:     <div class="row">
 59:       <div
 60:         v-for="poem in filteredPoems"
 61:         :key="poem.id"
 62:         class="col-6 col-md-4 col-lg-3 mb-4"
 63:       >
 64:         <div
 65:           class="poem-card"
 66:           :class="{
 67:             collected: isCollected(poem.id),
 68:             uncollected: !isCollected(poem.id),
 69:           }"
 70:           @click="showPoemDetail(poem)"
 71:         >
 72:           <div class="card h-100 text-center">
 73:             <div class="card-body">
 74:               <h5 class="card-title">{{ poem.id }}</h5>
 75:               <p class="poem-text" :class="{ blurred: !isCollected(poem.id) }">
 76:                 {{ poem.question }}<br />
 77:                 {{ poem.answer }}
 78:               </p>
 79:               <p class="card-text">
 80:                 <small class="text-muted" v-if="isCollected(poem.id)">{{
 81:                   poem.author
 82:                 }}</small>
 83:                 <small class="text-muted" v-else>？？？</small>
 84:               </p>
 85:               <span v-if="isCollected(poem.id)" class="badge bg-success"
 86:                 >習得済み</span
 87:               >
 88:               <span v-else class="badge bg-secondary">未習得</span>
 89:             </div>
 90:           </div>
 91:         </div>
 92:       </div>
 93:     </div>
 94:     <!-- 詳細モーダル -->
 95:     <b-modal
 96:       v-model="showModal"
 97:       :title="selectedPoem ? `第${selectedPoem.id}首` : ''"
 98:       size="lg"
 99:       hide-footer
100:     >
101:       <div v-if="selectedPoem" class="poem-detail">
102:         <h4>{{ selectedPoem.question }}</h4>
103:         <h4>{{ selectedPoem.answer }}</h4>
104:         <hr />
105:         <p><strong>作者:</strong> {{ selectedPoem.author }}</p>
106:         <div v-if="isCollected(selectedPoem.id)" class="mt-3">
107:           <b-badge variant="success" class="me-2">習得済み</b-badge>
108:         </div>
109:         <div v-else class="mt-3">
110:           <b-alert :model-value="true" variant="info">
111:             この歌を習得するには、ゲームで正解してください！
112:           </b-alert>
113:         </div>
114:       </div>
115:     </b-modal>
116:   </div>
117: </template>
118: <script>
119: import { mapGetters } from 'vuex'
120: import poems from '@/data/poems'
121: // フィルター種類の定数
122: const FILTERS = {
123:   ALL: 'all',
124:   COLLECTED: 'collected',
125:   UNCOLLECTED: 'uncollected',
126: }
127: export default {
128:   name: 'Collection',
129:   data () {
130:     return {
131:       poems,
132:       filter: FILTERS.ALL,
133:       showModal: false,
134:       selectedPoem: null,
135:     }
136:   },
137:   computed: {
138:     ...mapGetters('collection', ['collectedCount', 'isCollected']),
139:     totalCount () {
140:       return this.poems.length
141:     },
142:     collectionRate () {
143:       if (this.totalCount === 0) return 0
144:       return Math.round((this.collectedCount / this.totalCount) * 100)
145:     },
146:     filteredPoems () {
147:       if (this.filter === FILTERS.COLLECTED) {
148:         return this.poems.filter((p) => this.isCollected(p.id))
149:       } else if (this.filter === FILTERS.UNCOLLECTED) {
150:         return this.poems.filter((p) => !this.isCollected(p.id))
151:       }
152:       return this.poems
153:     },
154:   },
155:   methods: {
156:     showPoemDetail (poem) {
157:       this.selectedPoem = poem
158:       this.showModal = true
159:     },
160:   },
161: }
162: </script>
163: <style scoped>
164: .collection-container {
165:   padding: 20px;
166: }
167: .poem-card {
168:   cursor: pointer;
169:   transition: transform 0.2s;
170: }
171: .poem-card:hover {
172:   transform: scale(1.05);
173: }
174: .poem-card.collected .card {
175:   border: 3px solid #28a745;
176:   background-color: #f0fff4;
177: }
178: .poem-card.uncollected .card {
179:   border: 2px dashed #6c757d;
180:   background-color: #f8f9fa;
181:   opacity: 0.7;
182: }
183: .poem-text {
184:   font-size: 0.9rem;
185:   line-height: 1.4;
186:   min-height: 80px;
187: }
188: .poem-text.blurred {
189:   filter: blur(4px);
190:   user-select: none;
191: }
192: .poem-detail h4 {
193:   margin-bottom: 10px;
194:   color: #333;
195: }
196: </style>
````

## File: src/components/DailyChallenge.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div class="daily-challenge-container">
  3:     <!-- 既にクリア済みの場合 -->
  4:     <div v-if="alreadyCompleted" class="row justify-content-center">
  5:       <div class="col-md-8">
  6:         <div class="card bg-success text-white mb-4">
  7:           <div class="card-body text-center">
  8:             <h2 class="mb-3">🎉 今日のチャレンジクリア！</h2>
  9:             <p class="lead">おめでとうございます！</p>
 10:             <p class="mb-0">次のチャレンジは明日です。</p>
 11:           </div>
 12:         </div>
 13:         <div class="card bg-info text-white">
 14:           <div class="card-body text-center">
 15:             <h3 class="mb-3">⏰ 次のチャレンジまで</h3>
 16:             <div class="countdown display-4">
 17:               {{ countdown.hours }}:{{
 18:                 String(countdown.minutes).padStart(2, '0')
 19:               }}:{{ String(countdown.seconds).padStart(2, '0') }}
 20:             </div>
 21:           </div>
 22:         </div>
 23:         <div class="text-center mt-4">
 24:           <router-link to="/" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">
 25:             トップへ戻る
 26:           </router-link>
 27:         </div>
 28:       </div>
 29:     </div>
 30:     <!-- チャレンジ中 -->
 31:     <div v-else>
 32:       <!-- ヘッダー -->
 33:       <div class="row mb-3">
 34:         <div class="col-auto">
 35:           <h2>📅 今日のチャレンジ</h2>
 36:         </div>
 37:         <div class="col-auto">
 38:           <span class="badge badge-primary badge-lg">
 39:             {{ currentQuestionIndex + 1 }} / 5
 40:           </span>
 41:         </div>
 42:         <div class="col-auto">
 43:           <span class="badge bg-success badge-lg">
 44:             🔥 {{ currentStreak }}日連続
 45:           </span>
 46:         </div>
 47:         <div class="col-auto">
 48:           <button
 49:             class="btn btn-sm"
 50:             :class="{
 51:               'btn-primary': enableSpeak,
 52:               'btn-secondary': !enableSpeak,
 53:             }"
 54:             @click.prevent="clickSpeakToggle"
 55:           >
 56:             {{ enableSpeak ? '○' : '✕' }} よみあげ{{
 57:               enableSpeak ? 'あり' : 'なし'
 58:             }}
 59:           </button>
 60:         </div>
 61:       </div>
 62:       <!-- 問題表示 -->
 63:       <div class="row justify-content-center">
 64:         <div class="col-sm-10 cont main-container bg-secondary text-dark">
 65:           <p>{{ questionData.question }}</p>
 66:           <div class="row">
 67:             <div
 68:               class="col-sm-12"
 69:               v-for="(c, i) in questionData.choices"
 70:               :key="c"
 71:             >
 72:               <label
 73:                 class="option"
 74:                 :class="{
 75:                   correct: !thinking && c === questionData.answer,
 76:                   choiced: !thinking && c === choice,
 77:                 }"
 78:               >
 79:                 <input
 80:                   type="radio"
 81:                   v-model="choice"
 82:                   :value="c"
 83:                   :disabled="!thinking"
 84:                   @change="clickAnswer"
 85:                 />
 86:                 <span>({{ i + 1 }}) {{ c }}</span>
 87:               </label>
 88:             </div>
 89:           </div>
 90:           <div class="row justify-content-center">
 91:             <div class="col-sm-12">
 92:               <button
 93:                 class="btn btn-lg btn-primary btn-block"
 94:                 :disabled="thinking"
 95:                 @click="clickNext"
 96:               >
 97:                 次へ
 98:               </button>
 99:             </div>
100:           </div>
101:         </div>
102:       </div>
103:       <!-- イラスト -->
104:       <div class="row justify-content-center">
105:         <div class="col-auto text-center">
106:           <img
107:             src="@/assets/hyakunin_issyu.png"
108:             class="img-fluid w-75 mx-auto d-block"
109:             alt=""
110:           />
111:         </div>
112:       </div>
113:     </div>
114:     <!-- サウンド -->
115:     <audio ref="rightSoundDaily" preload>
116:       <source src="@/assets/right.mp3" type="audio/mp3" />
117:     </audio>
118:     <audio ref="wrongSoundDaily" preload>
119:       <source src="@/assets/wrong.mp3" type="audio/mp3" />
120:     </audio>
121:   </div>
122: </template>
123: <script>
124: import _ from 'underscore'
125: import poems from '@/data/poems'
126: import {
127:   getTodaysChallengePoems,
128:   isTodaysChallengeCompleted,
129:   getCurrentStreak,
130:   updateStreak,
131:   markTodaysChallengeCompleted,
132:   getTimeUntilNextChallenge,
133: } from '@/utils/dailyChallenge'
134: export default {
135:   name: 'DailyChallenge',
136:   data () {
137:     return {
138:       alreadyCompleted: false,
139:       currentQuestionIndex: 0,
140:       score: 0,
141:       newlyCollectedCount: 0,
142:       questionData: {
143:         question: '',
144:         choices: [],
145:         answer: '',
146:       },
147:       choice: null,
148:       thinking: false,
149:       questionList: [],
150:       currentStreak: 0,
151:       countdown: {
152:         hours: 0,
153:         minutes: 0,
154:         seconds: 0,
155:       },
156:       countdownInterval: null,
157:       speak: new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(),
158:       enableSpeak: true,
159:     }
160:   },
161:   mounted () {
162:     this.speak.pitch = 1
163:     this.speak.lang = 'ja-JP'
164:     // 既にクリア済みかチェック
165:     if (isTodaysChallengeCompleted()) {
166:       this.alreadyCompleted = true
167:       this.currentStreak = getCurrentStreak()
168:       this.startCountdown()
169:     } else {
170:       // 今日のチャレンジ用の5首を取得
171:       const todaysPoems = getTodaysChallengePoems(poems)
172:       this.questionList = todaysPoems.map((poem) => ({
173:         id: poem.id,
174:         question: poem.question,
175:         answer: poem.answer,
176:         choices: [],
177:       }))
178:       // 選択肢を生成
179:       const allAnswers = poems.map((p) => p.answer)
180:       this.questionList.forEach((q) => {
181:         const dummies = _.shuffle(
182:           allAnswers.filter((a) => a !== q.answer)
183:         ).slice(0, 3)
184:         q.choices = _.shuffle([q.answer, ...dummies])
185:       })
186:       this.currentStreak = getCurrentStreak()
187:       this.loadQuestion()
188:     }
189:   },
190:   beforeUnmount () {
191:     if (this.countdownInterval) {
192:       clearInterval(this.countdownInterval)
193:     }
194:   },
195:   methods: {
196:     async clickAnswer () {
197:       this.thinking = false
198:       this.speakText(this.questionData.answer)
199:       // 正解したら
200:       if (this.questionData.answer === this.choice) {
201:         this.score++
202:         const rightSound = this.$refs.rightSoundDaily
203:         rightSound.play()
204:         // コレクション図鑑に追加（新規追加だった場合のみカウント）
205:         const poemId = this.questionData.id
206:         const isNew = await this.addToCollection(poemId)
207:         if (isNew) {
208:           this.newlyCollectedCount++
209:         }
210:       } else {
211:         const wrongSound = this.$refs.wrongSoundDaily
212:         wrongSound.play()
213:       }
214:     },
215:     clickNext () {
216:       this.currentQuestionIndex++
217:       if (this.currentQuestionIndex < 5) {
218:         this.loadQuestion()
219:       } else {
220:         // 全問終了
221:         const isSuccess = this.score === 5
222:         const previousStreak = this.currentStreak
223:         updateStreak(isSuccess)
224:         if (isSuccess) {
225:           markTodaysChallengeCompleted()
226:         }
227:         const newStreak = getCurrentStreak()
228:         this.$router.push({
229:           name: 'DailyChallengeResult',
230:           params: {
231:             score: this.score,
232:             streak: newStreak,
233:             previousStreak,
234:             newlyCollectedCount: this.newlyCollectedCount,
235:           },
236:         })
237:       }
238:     },
239:     loadQuestion () {
240:       this.questionData = this.questionList[this.currentQuestionIndex]
241:       this.choice = null
242:       this.thinking = true
243:       this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
244:     },
245:     addToCollection (poemId) {
246:       return this.$store.dispatch('collection/addCollectedPoem', poemId)
247:     },
248:     startCountdown () {
249:       this.updateCountdown()
250:       this.countdownInterval = setInterval(() => {
251:         this.updateCountdown()
252:       }, 1000)
253:     },
254:     updateCountdown () {
255:       this.countdown = getTimeUntilNextChallenge()
256:     },
257:     clickSpeakToggle () {
258:       this.enableSpeak = !this.enableSpeak
259:       this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
260:     },
261:     speakQuestionIfEnabled () {
262:       this.speakText(this.questionData.question)
263:     },
264:     speakText (text) {
265:       if (!this.enableSpeak) return
266:       speechSynthesis.cancel()
267:       this.speak.text = text
268:       speechSynthesis.speak(this.speak)
269:     },
270:   },
271: }
272: </script>
273: <style scoped>
274: .daily-challenge-container {
275:   padding: 20px;
276: }
277: .main-container {
278:   padding: 30px;
279:   border-radius: 10px;
280:   margin-bottom: 20px;
281: }
282: .main-container p {
283:   font-size: 1.5rem;
284:   font-weight: bold;
285:   margin-bottom: 30px;
286: }
287: .option {
288:   display: block;
289:   padding: 15px;
290:   margin-bottom: 10px;
291:   border: 2px solid #ddd;
292:   border-radius: 5px;
293:   cursor: pointer;
294:   transition: all 0.3s;
295:   background: white;
296: }
297: .option:hover {
298:   background: #f8f9fa;
299:   border-color: #007bff;
300: }
301: .option input {
302:   margin-right: 10px;
303: }
304: .option.correct {
305:   background: #d4edda;
306:   border-color: #28a745;
307:   color: #155724;
308: }
309: .option.choiced {
310:   background: #f8d7da;
311:   border-color: #dc3545;
312:   color: #721c24;
313: }
314: .badge-lg {
315:   font-size: 1.2rem;
316:   padding: 8px 15px;
317: }
318: .countdown {
319:   font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
320:   font-weight: bold;
321:   margin: 20px 0;
322: }
323: </style>
````

## File: src/components/DailyChallengeResult.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div class="daily-challenge-result-container">
  3:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
  4:       <div class="col-md-8">
  5:         <!-- 結果表示 -->
  6:         <div class="result-card" :class="resultClass">
  7:           <div class="card-body text-center">
  8:             <h1 class="display-1 mb-3">{{ emoji }}</h1>
  9:             <h2 class="mb-4">{{ resultMessage }}</h2>
 10:             <div class="score-display mb-4">
 11:               <p class="score-label">今日のスコア</p>
 12:               <p class="score-value">{{ score }} / 5</p>
 13:             </div>
 14:             <div v-if="isPerfect" class="perfect-bonus mb-4">
 15:               <h3>🏆 パーフェクト！</h3>
 16:               <p class="lead">5問全て正解しました！</p>
 17:             </div>
 18:             <div class="streak-display mb-4">
 19:               <h3 class="streak-title">🔥 連続達成記録</h3>
 20:               <p class="streak-value">{{ currentStreak }}日連続</p>
 21:               <p v-if="streakIncreased" class="streak-message text-success">
 22:                 連続記録が更新されました！
 23:               </p>
 24:               <p v-else-if="streakReset" class="streak-message text-warning">
 25:                 連続記録がリセットされました。明日また挑戦しましょう！
 26:               </p>
 27:             </div>
 28:             <div v-if="collectedCount > 0" class="collection-update mb-4">
 29:               <p class="text-muted">
 30:                 ✅ {{ collectedCount }}首をコレクション図鑑に追加しました
 31:               </p>
 32:             </div>
 33:           </div>
 34:         </div>
 35:         <!-- アクションボタン -->
 36:         <div class="row mt-4">
 37:           <div class="col-6">
 38:             <router-link
 39:               to="/collection"
 40:               class="btn btn-lg btn-success btn-block"
 41:             >
 42:               📚 コレクション図鑑
 43:             </router-link>
 44:           </div>
 45:           <div class="col-6">
 46:             <router-link to="/badges" class="btn btn-lg btn-warning btn-block">
 47:               🎖️ バッジコレクション
 48:             </router-link>
 49:           </div>
 50:         </div>
 51:         <div class="text-center mt-4">
 52:           <router-link to="/" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary ps-5 pe-5">
 53:             トップへ戻る
 54:           </router-link>
 55:         </div>
 56:         <!-- 次のチャレンジ告知 -->
 57:         <div class="card bg-info text-white mt-4">
 58:           <div class="card-body text-center">
 59:             <h4 class="mb-2">次のチャレンジは明日！</h4>
 60:             <p class="mb-0">毎日続けて記録を伸ばそう 🎯</p>
 61:           </div>
 62:         </div>
 63:       </div>
 64:     </div>
 65:   </div>
 66: </template>
 67: <script>
 68: export default {
 69:   name: 'DailyChallengeResult',
 70:   data () {
 71:     return {
 72:       score: 0,
 73:       currentStreak: 0,
 74:       previousStreak: 0,
 75:       collectedCount: 0,
 76:     }
 77:   },
 78:   computed: {
 79:     isPerfect () {
 80:       return this.score === 5
 81:     },
 82:     resultClass () {
 83:       if (this.isPerfect) {
 84:         return 'card bg-gradient-gold text-white'
 85:       } else if (this.score >= 3) {
 86:         return 'card bg-gradient-success text-white'
 87:       } else {
 88:         return 'card bg-gradient-info text-white'
 89:       }
 90:     },
 91:     emoji () {
 92:       if (this.isPerfect) return '🏆'
 93:       if (this.score >= 4) return '🎉'
 94:       if (this.score >= 3) return '👏'
 95:       if (this.score >= 1) return '💪'
 96:       return '📝'
 97:     },
 98:     resultMessage () {
 99:       if (this.isPerfect) return 'パーフェクト！'
100:       if (this.score >= 4) return 'すばらしい！'
101:       if (this.score >= 3) return 'よくできました！'
102:       if (this.score >= 1) return 'がんばりました！'
103:       return '明日またちょうせん！'
104:     },
105:     streakIncreased () {
106:       return this.currentStreak > this.previousStreak && this.currentStreak > 0
107:     },
108:     streakReset () {
109:       return this.currentStreak === 0 && this.previousStreak > 0
110:     },
111:   },
112:   mounted () {
113:     this.score = parseInt(this.$route.params.score, 10) || 0
114:     this.currentStreak = parseInt(this.$route.params.streak, 10) || 0
115:     this.previousStreak = parseInt(this.$route.params.previousStreak, 10) || 0
116:     this.collectedCount =
117:       parseInt(this.$route.params.newlyCollectedCount, 10) || 0
118:   },
119: }
120: </script>
121: <style scoped>
122: .daily-challenge-result-container {
123:   padding: 20px;
124:   min-height: 80vh;
125: }
126: .result-card {
127:   border-radius: 15px;
128:   box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgb(0 0 0 / 20%);
129: }
130: .bg-gradient-gold {
131:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f6d365 0%, #fda085 100%);
132: }
133: .bg-gradient-success {
134:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #84fab0 0%, #8fd3f4 100%);
135: }
136: .bg-gradient-info {
137:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #a1c4fd 0%, #c2e9fb 100%);
138: }
139: .score-display {
140:   background: rgb(255 255 255 / 20%);
141:   padding: 30px;
142:   border-radius: 10px;
143:   margin: 20px auto;
144:   max-width: 300px;
145: }
146: .score-label {
147:   font-size: 1.2rem;
148:   margin-bottom: 10px;
149:   font-weight: bold;
150: }
151: .score-value {
152:   font-size: 4rem;
153:   font-weight: bold;
154:   margin: 0;
155:   font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
156: }
157: .perfect-bonus {
158:   background: rgb(255 255 255 / 30%);
159:   padding: 20px;
160:   border-radius: 10px;
161:   animation: pulse 2s infinite;
162: }
163: @keyframes pulse {
164:   0%,
165:   100% {
166:     transform: scale(1);
167:   }
168:   50% {
169:     transform: scale(1.05);
170:   }
171: }
172: .streak-display {
173:   background: rgb(255 255 255 / 20%);
174:   padding: 20px;
175:   border-radius: 10px;
176: }
177: .streak-title {
178:   margin-bottom: 15px;
179: }
180: .streak-value {
181:   font-size: 3rem;
182:   font-weight: bold;
183:   margin: 10px 0;
184:   font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
185: }
186: .streak-message {
187:   font-size: 1.1rem;
188:   font-weight: bold;
189:   margin-top: 10px;
190: }
191: .collection-update {
192:   font-size: 1.1rem;
193: }
194: </style>
````

## File: src/components/GameSet.vue
````vue
 1: <template>
 2:   <div>
 3:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
 4:       <div class="col-sm-10">
 5:         <div class="result bg-dark text-light">
 6:           <p>{{ countOfQuestions }}もん のうち</p>
 7:           <p class="score">{{ score }}もん せいかい</p>
 8:           <p>でした。</p>
 9:         </div>
10:         <div class="row justify-content-center">
11:           <div class="col-auto">
12:             <p>
13:               <strong>よろしければシェアをおねがいします！</strong>
14:             </p>
15:           </div>
16:         </div>
17:         <div class="row justify-content-center">
18:           <div class="col-auto">
19:             <p>
20:               <a
21:                 class="twitter-share-button"
22:                 :href="TWITTER_SHARE_URL"
23:                 data-size="large"
24:                 data-text="ひゃくにんいっしゅをおぼえよう"
25:                 data-url="https://hyakuninissyu.genzouw.com"
26:               >シェア</a>
27:             </p>
28:           </div>
29:         </div>
30:         <div class="row justify-content-center">
31:           <div class="col-auto">
32:             <h3>
33:               <router-link to="/" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">もういっかいちゃれんじ！</router-link>
34:             </h3>
35:           </div>
36:         </div>
37:       </div>
38:     </div>
39:   </div>
40: </template>
41: <script>
42: import { TWITTER_SHARE_URL } from '../constants/url'
43: export default {
44:   data () {
45:     return {
46:       countOfQuestions: 0,
47:       score: 0,
48:       TWITTER_SHARE_URL
49:     }
50:   },
51:   created () {
52:     this.fetchData()
53:   },
54:   watch: {
55:     $route: 'fetchData'
56:   },
57:   methods: {
58:     fetchData () {
59:       this.countOfQuestions = Number(this.$route.params.countOfQuestions)
60:       this.score = Number(this.$route.params.score)
61:     }
62:   },
63:   computed: {
64:     result () {
65:       return ` ${this.score}もん せいかい ( ${
66:         this.countOfQuestions
67:       }もんちゅう )`
68:     }
69:   }
70: }
71: </script>
72: <style scoped>
73: .result {
74:   text-align: center;
75:   font-size: 150%;
76: }
77: .result .score {
78:   font-size: 200%;
79: }
80: </style>
````

## File: src/components/Playing.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div>
  3:     <div class="row">
  4:       <div class="col-auto">
  5:         <h2>[だい{{ currentQuestionIndex + 1 }}もん]</h2>
  6:       </div>
  7:       <div class="col-auto">
  8:         <button
  9:           class="btn btn-sm btn-primary"
 10:           v-bind:class="{
 11:             'btn-primary': this.enableSpeak,
 12:             'btn-secondary': !this.enableSpeak,
 13:           }"
 14:           @click.prevent="clickSpeakToggle"
 15:         >
 16:           {{ this.enableSpeak ? '○' : '✕' }} よみあげ{{
 17:             this.enableSpeak ? 'あり' : 'なし'
 18:           }}
 19:         </button>
 20:       </div>
 21:     </div>
 22:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
 23:       <div class="col-sm-10 cont main-container bg-secondary text-dark">
 24:         <p>{{ questionData.question }}</p>
 25:         <div class="row">
 26:           <div
 27:             class="col-sm-12"
 28:             v-for="(c, i) in questionData.choices"
 29:             v-bind:key="c"
 30:           >
 31:             <label
 32:               class="option"
 33:               v-bind:class="{
 34:                 correct: !thinking && c === questionData.answer,
 35:                 choiced: !thinking && c === choice,
 36:               }"
 37:             >
 38:               <input
 39:                 type="radio"
 40:                 v-model="choice"
 41:                 v-bind:value="c"
 42:                 v-bind:disabled="!thinking"
 43:                 @change.prevent="clickAnswer"
 44:               />
 45:               <span>({{ i + 1 }}) {{ c }}</span>
 46:             </label>
 47:           </div>
 48:         </div>
 49:         <div class="row justify-content-center">
 50:           <div class="col-sm-12">
 51:             <button
 52:               class="btn btn-lg btn-primary btn-block"
 53:               v-bind:disabled="thinking"
 54:               @click.prevent="clickNext"
 55:             >
 56:               次へ
 57:             </button>
 58:           </div>
 59:         </div>
 60:       </div>
 61:     </div>
 62:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
 63:       <div class="col-auto text-center">
 64:         <img
 65:           src="@/assets/hyakunin_issyu.png"
 66:           class="img-fluid w-75 mx-auto d-block"
 67:           alt=""
 68:         />
 69:       </div>
 70:     </div>
 71:     <audio id="right-sound" preload>
 72:       <source src="@/assets/right.mp3" type="audio/mp3" />
 73:     </audio>
 74:     <audio id="wrong-sound" preload>
 75:       <source src="@/assets/wrong.mp3" type="audio/mp3" />
 76:     </audio>
 77:   </div>
 78: </template>
 79: <script>
 80: import _ from 'underscore'
 81: import poems from '@/data/poems'
 82: export default {
 83:   data () {
 84:     return {
 85:       currentQuestionIndex: 0,
 86:       score: 0,
 87:       countOfQuestions: 0,
 88:       questionData: {
 89:         question: '',
 90:         choices: [],
 91:         answer: ''
 92:       },
 93:       choice: null,
 94:       thinking: false,
 95:       questionList: [],
 96:       speak: new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(),
 97:       enableSpeak: true
 98:     }
 99:   },
100:   mounted () {
101:     this.speak.pitch = 1
102:     this.speak.lang = 'ja-JP'
103:     this.countOfQuestions = this.$route.params.countOfQuestions
104:     this.questionList = _.shuffle(poems)
105:     this.loadQuestion()
106:   },
107:   methods: {
108:     clickStart () {
109:       this.clickNext()
110:     },
111:     clickAnswer () {
112:       this.thinking = false
113:       if (this.enableSpeak) {
114:         speechSynthesis.cancel(this.speak)
115:         this.speak.text = this.questionData.answer
116:         speechSynthesis.speak(this.speak)
117:       }
118:       // 正解したら
119:       if (this.questionData.answer === this.choice) {
120:         this.score++
121:         this.$store.dispatch(
122:           'collection/addCollectedPoem',
123:           this.questionData.id
124:         )
125:         const rightSound = document.getElementById('right-sound')
126:         rightSound.play()
127:       } else {
128:         const wrongSound = document.getElementById('wrong-sound')
129:         wrongSound.play()
130:       }
131:     },
132:     clickNext () {
133:       this.currentQuestionIndex++
134:       if (this.currentQuestionIndex < this.countOfQuestions) {
135:         this.loadQuestion()
136:       } else {
137:         this.$router.push(`/gameSet/${this.countOfQuestions}/${this.score}`)
138:       }
139:     },
140:     loadQuestion () {
141:       this.questionData = { ...this.questionList[this.currentQuestionIndex] }
142:       const dummyAnswers = this.questionList.reduce((acc, v) => {
143:         if (v.answer !== this.questionData.answer) {
144:           acc.push(v.answer)
145:         }
146:         return acc
147:       }, [])
148:       const dummies = _.shuffle(dummyAnswers)
149:       this.questionData.choices = [
150:         this.questionData.answer,
151:         dummies[0],
152:         dummies[1],
153:         dummies[2]
154:       ]
155:       this.questionData.choices = _.shuffle(this.questionData.choices)
156:       this.thinking = true
157:       this.choice = null
158:       this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
159:     },
160:     clickSpeakToggle () {
161:       this.enableSpeak = !this.enableSpeak
162:       this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
163:     },
164:     speakQuestionIfEnabled () {
165:       if (this.enableSpeak) {
166:         speechSynthesis.cancel(this.speak)
167:         this.speak.text = this.questionData.question
168:         speechSynthesis.speak(this.speak)
169:       }
170:     }
171:   }
172: }
173: </script>
174: <!-- Add "scoped" attribute to limit CSS to this component only -->
175: <style scoped>
176: #navbarSupportedContent h1 {
177:   font-size: 100%;
178: }
179: .quiz-start-page {
180:   text-align: center;
181:   /* background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #f7ff9194, #f7ff91b8); */
182: }
183: .option {
184:   width: 95%;
185:   padding: 10px 0 10px 10px;
186:   background: #e2e2e2;
187:   margin: 10px 0 10px 10px;
188:   color: #000;
189:   border-radius: 20px;
190:   margin-bottom: 0.25em;
191: }
192: .choiced {
193:   background-color: pink;
194: }
195: .choiced::after {
196:   content: ' ×';
197:   color: red;
198:   font-weight: bold;
199: }
200: .correct {
201:   background-color: lightblue;
202:   color: darkblue;
203: }
204: .correct.choiced {
205:   background-color: lightgreen;
206: }
207: .correct.choiced::after {
208:   content: ' ○';
209:   color: blue;
210:   font-weight: bold;
211: }
212: </style>
````

## File: src/components/TimeAttack.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div>
  3:     <div class="row mb-3">
  4:       <div class="col-md-6">
  5:         <div class="card bg-primary text-white">
  6:           <div class="card-body text-center">
  7:             <h5 class="card-title">経過時間</h5>
  8:             <h2 class="display-4">{{ formattedTime }}</h2>
  9:           </div>
 10:         </div>
 11:       </div>
 12:       <div class="col-md-6">
 13:         <div class="card bg-success text-white">
 14:           <div class="card-body text-center">
 15:             <h5 class="card-title">残り枚数</h5>
 16:             <h2 class="display-4">{{ remainingCards }}</h2>
 17:           </div>
 18:         </div>
 19:       </div>
 20:     </div>
 21:     <div class="row">
 22:       <div class="col-auto">
 23:         <h2>[だい{{ currentQuestionIndex + 1 }}もん]</h2>
 24:       </div>
 25:       <div class="col-auto">
 26:         <button
 27:           class="btn btn-sm btn-primary"
 28:           v-bind:class="{
 29:             'btn-primary': this.enableSpeak,
 30:             'btn-secondary': !this.enableSpeak,
 31:           }"
 32:           @click.prevent="clickSpeakToggle"
 33:         >
 34:           {{ this.enableSpeak ? '○' : '✕' }} よみあげ{{
 35:             this.enableSpeak ? 'あり' : 'なし'
 36:           }}
 37:         </button>
 38:       </div>
 39:     </div>
 40:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
 41:       <div class="col-sm-10 cont main-container bg-secondary text-dark">
 42:         <p>{{ questionData.question }}</p>
 43:         <div class="row">
 44:           <div
 45:             class="col-sm-12"
 46:             v-for="(c, i) in questionData.choices"
 47:             v-bind:key="c"
 48:           >
 49:             <label
 50:               class="option"
 51:               v-bind:class="{
 52:                 correct: !thinking && c === questionData.answer,
 53:                 choiced: !thinking && c === choice,
 54:               }"
 55:             >
 56:               <input
 57:                 type="radio"
 58:                 v-model="choice"
 59:                 v-bind:value="c"
 60:                 v-bind:disabled="!thinking"
 61:                 @change.prevent="clickAnswer"
 62:               />
 63:               <span>({{ i + 1 }}) {{ c }}</span>
 64:             </label>
 65:           </div>
 66:         </div>
 67:         <div class="row justify-content-center">
 68:           <div class="col-sm-12">
 69:             <button
 70:               class="btn btn-lg btn-primary btn-block"
 71:               v-bind:disabled="thinking"
 72:               @click.prevent="clickNext"
 73:             >
 74:               次へ
 75:             </button>
 76:           </div>
 77:         </div>
 78:       </div>
 79:     </div>
 80:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
 81:       <div class="col-auto text-center">
 82:         <img
 83:           src="@/assets/hyakunin_issyu.png"
 84:           class="img-fluid w-75 mx-auto d-block"
 85:           alt=""
 86:         />
 87:       </div>
 88:     </div>
 89:     <audio id="right-sound" preload>
 90:       <source src="@/assets/right.mp3" type="audio/mp3" />
 91:     </audio>
 92:     <audio id="wrong-sound" preload>
 93:       <source src="@/assets/wrong.mp3" type="audio/mp3" />
 94:     </audio>
 95:   </div>
 96: </template>
 97: <script>
 98: import _ from 'underscore'
 99: import { mapGetters, mapActions } from 'vuex'
100: import poems from '@/data/poems'
101: export default {
102:   data () {
103:     return {
104:       currentQuestionIndex: 0,
105:       score: 0,
106:       questionData: {
107:         question: '',
108:         choices: [],
109:         answer: ''
110:       },
111:       choice: null,
112:       thinking: false,
113:       questionList: [],
114:       speak: new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(),
115:       enableSpeak: true
116:     }
117:   },
118:   computed: {
119:     ...mapGetters('timeAttack', [
120:       'formattedTime',
121:       'isGameFinished',
122:       'elapsedTimeMs'
123:     ]),
124:     remainingCards () {
125:       return this.$store.state.timeAttack.remainingCards
126:     }
127:   },
128:   mounted () {
129:     this.speak.pitch = 1
130:     this.speak.lang = 'ja-JP'
131:     // 全100首をシャッフルして使用
132:     this.questionList = _.shuffle(poems)
133:     // ゲーム開始
134:     this.startGame()
135:     this.loadQuestion()
136:   },
137:   beforeUnmount () {
138:     // コンポーネント破棄時にタイマーを停止
139:     this.stopGame()
140:   },
141:   methods: {
142:     ...mapActions('timeAttack', ['startGame', 'answerCard', 'stopGame']),
143:     clickAnswer () {
144:       this.thinking = false
145:       if (this.enableSpeak) {
146:         speechSynthesis.cancel(this.speak)
147:         this.speak.text = this.questionData.answer
148:         speechSynthesis.speak(this.speak)
149:       }
150:       // 正解したら
151:       if (this.questionData.answer === this.choice) {
152:         this.score++
153:         this.$store.dispatch(
154:           'collection/addCollectedPoem',
155:           this.questionData.id
156:         )
157:         const rightSound = document.getElementById('right-sound')
158:         rightSound.play()
159:       } else {
160:         const wrongSound = document.getElementById('wrong-sound')
161:         wrongSound.play()
162:       }
163:       // 枚数を減らす
164:       this.answerCard()
165:     },
166:     clickNext () {
167:       this.currentQuestionIndex++
168:       // 全100首クリアしたら結果画面へ
169:       if (this.currentQuestionIndex < this.questionList.length) {
170:         this.loadQuestion()
171:       } else {
172:         this.stopGame()
173:         this.$router.push(
174:           `/time-attack-result/${this.elapsedTimeMs}/${this.score}`
175:         )
176:       }
177:     },
178:     loadQuestion () {
179:       this.questionData = { ...this.questionList[this.currentQuestionIndex] }
180:       const dummyAnswers = this.questionList.reduce((acc, v) => {
181:         if (v.answer !== this.questionData.answer) {
182:           acc.push(v.answer)
183:         }
184:         return acc
185:       }, [])
186:       const dummies = _.shuffle(dummyAnswers)
187:       this.questionData.choices = [
188:         this.questionData.answer,
189:         dummies[0],
190:         dummies[1],
191:         dummies[2]
192:       ]
193:       this.questionData.choices = _.shuffle(this.questionData.choices)
194:       this.thinking = true
195:       this.choice = null
196:       this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
197:     },
198:     clickSpeakToggle () {
199:       this.enableSpeak = !this.enableSpeak
200:       this.speakQuestionIfEnabled()
201:     },
202:     speakQuestionIfEnabled () {
203:       if (this.enableSpeak) {
204:         speechSynthesis.cancel(this.speak)
205:         this.speak.text = this.questionData.question
206:         speechSynthesis.speak(this.speak)
207:       }
208:     }
209:   }
210: }
211: </script>
212: <!-- Add "scoped" attribute to limit CSS to this component only -->
213: <style scoped>
214: .option {
215:   width: 95%;
216:   padding: 10px 0 10px 10px;
217:   background: #e2e2e2;
218:   margin: 10px 0 10px 10px;
219:   color: #000;
220:   border-radius: 20px;
221:   margin-bottom: 0.25em;
222: }
223: .choiced {
224:   background-color: pink;
225: }
226: .choiced::after {
227:   content: ' ×';
228:   color: red;
229:   font-weight: bold;
230: }
231: .correct {
232:   background-color: lightblue;
233:   color: darkblue;
234: }
235: .correct.choiced {
236:   background-color: lightgreen;
237: }
238: .correct.choiced::after {
239:   content: ' ○';
240:   color: blue;
241:   font-weight: bold;
242: }
243: .card {
244:   box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgb(0 0 0 / 10%);
245: }
246: .display-4 {
247:   font-weight: bold;
248: }
249: </style>
````

## File: src/components/TimeAttackResult.vue
````vue
 1: <template>
 2:   <div class="container mt-5">
 3:     <div class="row justify-content-center">
 4:       <div class="col-md-8">
 5:         <div class="card">
 6:           <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white text-center">
 7:             <h2>タイムアタック完了！</h2>
 8:           </div>
 9:           <div class="card-body text-center">
10:             <h3 class="mb-4">クリアタイム</h3>
11:             <h1 class="display-1 text-primary mb-4">{{ formattedTime }}</h1>
12:             <div class="row mb-4">
13:               <div class="col-md-6">
14:                 <div class="card bg-light">
15:                   <div class="card-body">
16:                     <h5>正解数</h5>
17:                     <h3>{{ score }} / 100</h3>
18:                   </div>
19:                 </div>
20:               </div>
21:               <div class="col-md-6">
22:                 <div class="card bg-light">
23:                   <div class="card-body">
24:                     <h5>正答率</h5>
25:                     <h3>{{ accuracy }}%</h3>
26:                   </div>
27:                 </div>
28:               </div>
29:             </div>
30:             <div class="mt-4">
31:               <router-link to="/" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg me-2">ホームに戻る</router-link>
32:               <router-link to="/time-attack" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">もう一度挑戦</router-link>
33:             </div>
34:           </div>
35:         </div>
36:       </div>
37:     </div>
38:   </div>
39: </template>
40: <script>
41: export default {
42:   data () {
43:     return {
44:       timeMs: 0,
45:       score: 0
46:     }
47:   },
48:   computed: {
49:     formattedTime () {
50:       return this.formatTimeMs(this.timeMs)
51:     },
52:     accuracy () {
53:       return ((this.score / 100) * 100).toFixed(1)
54:     }
55:   },
56:   mounted () {
57:     this.timeMs = parseInt(this.$route.params.timeMs)
58:     this.score = parseInt(this.$route.params.score)
59:   },
60:   methods: {
61:     formatTimeMs (ms) {
62:       const seconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000)
63:       const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60)
64:       const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60
65:       const milliseconds = Math.floor((ms % 1000) / 10)
66:       return `${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${remainingSeconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}.${milliseconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`
67:     }
68:   }
69: }
70: </script>
71: <style scoped>
72: .display-1 {
73:   font-weight: bold;
74:   font-size: 4rem;
75: }
76: .card-header h2 {
77:   margin: 0;
78: }
79: </style>
````

## File: src/components/Top.vue
````vue
  1: <template>
  2:   <div>
  3:     <div class="row">
  4:       <div class="col-auto">
  5:         <h2>なんもんせいかいできるかな？</h2>
  6:         <p>もんだいのかずをえらんだら「はじめる」ボタンをおしてね。</p>
  7:       </div>
  8:     </div>
  9:     <VeeForm v-slot="{ errors }" @submit="startGame">
 10:       <div class="row justify-content-center">
 11:         <div class="col-12">
 12:           <div class="mb-3 row">
 13:             <label
 14:               for="countOfQuestions"
 15:               class="col-4 col-form-label col-form-label-lg"
 16:               >もんだいのかず</label
 17:             >
 18:             <div class="col-4">
 19:               <Field
 20:                 id="countOfQuestions"
 21:                 name="countOfQuestions"
 22:                 :rules="validateCount"
 23:                 v-model.number="countOfQuestions"
 24:                 type="number"
 25:                 min="1"
 26:                 max="100"
 27:                 class="form-control form-control-lg"
 28:               />
 29:             </div>
````
